title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
content: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

light_analysis.summary: OpenAI推出了合作伙伴网络（OpenAI Partner Network），并投资1.5亿美元，旨在帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业AI的采用、部署和转型。该网络将提供资源、工具和支持，以推动企业级AI解决方案的落地，进一步扩大OpenAI在商业领域的影响力。
